name: Lark (International)
description: ByteDances international enterprise collaboration suite with chat, docs, video and app platform (sister of Feishu).

seo.title: Lark (International) — Customer Support SDK / In-app Helpdesk
seo.meta_description: Lark (International): ByteDances international enterprise collaboration suite with chat, docs, video and app platform (sister of Feishu).

when_to_use: ByteDance Lark bot for automated project update notifications
International team collaboration with docs, chat, and video
Custom Lark app for HR approval workflows in global teams
Third-party integration via Lark's open platform API
Enterprise collaboration suite for international ByteDance subsidiaries

pros: Free tier generous for small teams
Open platform for bots and apps
cons: Smaller ecosystem than Slack or Teams
Owned by ByteDance, geopolitical risk for some
Docs collaboration less deep than Notion
Enterprise references thinner in the West
review.verdict: A credible Slack plus Notion alternative with real free value, but ownership concerns linger.
review.best_for: SMBs and regional teams wanting a free, integrated collaboration suite.
review.not_for: US government, defense, or enterprises sensitive to ByteDance ownership.

pricing.high_water_mark_reason: Free / hobby tier; no peak-lock evidence.
